title: coleus glabriflorus
intro: Coleus glabriflorus, also known as Solenostemon glabriflorus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus glabriflorus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Coleus glabriflorus can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, or applied topically as a paste or poultice to treat various ailments.
